title: iguanura humilis
intro: Iguanura humilis, also known as the rat tail palm, is a type of plant species that belongs to the Arecaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to possess medicinal properties in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Iguanura humilis include its potential in reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Herbal preparations of the plant include making tea from its leaves and using its extracts in capsules or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
